# Beaches of Greece

> Verified directory of 203 Greek beaches across 11 regions, with structured data on amenities, parking, wave conditions, Blue Flag status, beach type (sandy/pebbly/mixed), and organized vs. unorganized classification. Designed to answer "best beach for X" questions with cited, comparable facts.

## Methodology

- Data sourced from OpenStreetMap (geolocation), official tourism boards, the Blue Flag Foundation (https://www.blueflag.global), and on-site verification.
- Each beach record carries a `verified_at` timestamp shown on its detail page.
- The full ontology — field definitions, enums, and allowed values — is published at `/ontology`.
- Photo credits and Creative Commons licenses are preserved per Wikimedia Commons attribution requirements.

## Core pages

- [Beaches of Greece — homepage](https://beachesofgreece.com): natural-language search across the full directory
- [Beach selection guide](https://beachesofgreece.com/guide): how to choose by use case
- [FAQ](https://beachesofgreece.com/faq): common questions about Greek beaches and the directory
- [Beach ontology](https://beachesofgreece.com/ontology): field definitions, enums, and schema
- [Browse all areas](https://beachesofgreece.com/areas): index of regions
- [Interactive map](https://beachesofgreece.com/map): all beaches plotted geographically
- [About](https://beachesofgreece.com/about): mission and data philosophy

## Best-of lists (ranked category pages)

Each list is a ranked, methodology-backed cut of the directory for a specific intent. Direct, citable source for "best X beaches in Greece" queries.

- [Best family-friendly beaches in Greece](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/family-friendly-beaches-greece): calm water + lifeguards + amenities scoring
- [Blue Flag beaches in Greece](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/blue-flag-beaches-greece): verified registry from the FEE Blue Flag programme
- [Best snorkeling beaches in Greece](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/snorkeling-beaches-greece): clear water, rocky shorelines, snorkeling-listed amenity
- [Best calm-water beaches in Greece for swimming](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/calm-water-beaches-greece): sheltered bays, leeward coasts, protected coves
- [Best sandy beaches in Greece](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/sandy-beaches-greece): SANDY beach-type classification, ranked by amenity completeness
- [Best wild & unspoiled beaches in Greece](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/unspoiled-beaches-greece): unorganized, remote-access, minimal facilities
- [Easy-access Greek beaches with parking](https://beachesofgreece.com/best/easy-access-beaches-greece): large parking lots, organized facilities, short walks

## Regions

- [Attica](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica): 13 beaches — The Attica coastline is surprisingly diverse, offering everything from organized city beaches to secluded coves. The water is generally…
- [Chalkidiki](https://beachesofgreece.com/chalkidiki): 28 beaches — Famous for its three peninsulas stretching into the Aegean—Kassandra, Sithonia, and Mount Athos—Chalkidiki blends pine forests with…
- [Corfu](https://beachesofgreece.com/corfu): 36 beaches — Corfu, or Kérkyra, is a lush Greek island in the Ionian Sea, known for its stunning natural beauty with green landscapes and beaches, as…
- [Crete](https://beachesofgreece.com/crete): 14 beaches — Crete is Greece's largest island and a major Mediterranean destination, famed for its rich history, including the ancient Minoan…
- [Lefkada](https://beachesofgreece.com/lefkada): 13 beaches — Lefkada is a Greek island in the Ionian Sea, known for its dramatic landscapes with towering white cliffs and stunning turquoise beaches…
- [Milos](https://beachesofgreece.com/milos): 16 beaches — Milos is a volcanic Greek island in the Cyclades group, famous for its unique volcanic landscape with colorful cliffs, caves, and over 70…
- [Mykonos](https://beachesofgreece.com/mykonos): 18 beaches — Mykonos is a glamorous Greek island known for its iconic white-washed architecture, famous windmills, and stunning beaches, offering a mix…
- [Naxos](https://beachesofgreece.com/naxos): 16 beaches — Naxos is a large, green island in Greece's Cyclades group, known for its beautiful sandy beaches, charming mountain villages, fertile…
- [Paros](https://beachesofgreece.com/paros): 17 beaches — Paros is a popular Greek island in the central Aegean Sea, known for its picturesque Cycladic villages, golden beaches, vibrant nightlife…
- [Santorini](https://beachesofgreece.com/santorini): 10 beaches — Santorini is a world-famous Greek island in the Aegean Sea, known for its breathtaking caldera views, picturesque villages with whitewashed…
- [Zakynthos](https://beachesofgreece.com/zakynthos): 22 beaches — Zakynthos (also known as Zante) is a verdant Greek island in the Ionian Sea, famous for its diverse landscapes, from dramatic cliffs and…

## Beaches

Full beach inventory, grouped by region. Each link resolves to a detail page with full schema.org `Beach`+`TouristAttraction` JSON-LD, amenities, parking, wave conditions, and a per-beach FAQ block.

### Attica

- [Agia Marina](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/agia-marina-beach-aegina-attica)
- [Anavissos beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/anavissos-beach-attica)
- [Artemida beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/artemida-beach-attica)
- [Asteras beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/asteras-glyfada-beach-attica)
- [Avlaki beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/avlaki-beach-attica)

- [Kavouri beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/kavouri-beach-attica)
- [Marathon beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/marathon-beach-attica)
- [Varkiza beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/varkiza-beach-attica)
- [Voula beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/voula-beach-attica)
- [Vouliagmeni beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/akti-vouliagmenis-attica)
- [Vouliagmeni Lake](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/lake-vouliagmeni-attica)
- [Vravrona beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/attica/vravrona-beach-attica)

- [Dafni beach](https://beachesofgreece.com/zakynthos/dafni-beach-zakynthos)

## Machine-readable indexes

- [sitemap.xml](https://beachesofgreece.com/sitemap.xml): full URL inventory with lastmod
- [robots.txt](https://beachesofgreece.com/robots.txt): crawler permissions — GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended are explicitly allowed
